chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI JCM No. 12 of 2012 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of Main Petition. 19-02-2026 Ms. Aneela, Advocate, holds brief for Mr. Khurrum Rasheed, Advocate for the Petitioner. M/s. Saalim Salam Ansari and Okash Mustafa, Advocates for the Respondent. ********** None is appearing on behalf of the Petitioner. Ms. Aneela, Advocate, holding brief for Mr. Khurram Rasheed, Advocate, submits that the Counsel for the Petitioner is not available today. A perusal of the diary sheet shows that none has been appearing on behalf of the Petitioner, which appears that the Petitioner has lost interest in the said matter. Accordingly, the matter is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE SHABAN*
